covers.rationale: SMEs serve diverse customer bases and geographies; flexible segmentation prevents pricing errors and supports localized strategies.

covers.text: Define quantity-based volume discounts with configurable break points and discount percentages.
covers.rationale: Volume incentives drive larger orders and simplify negotiation; configurable thresholds adapt to different product categories.

covers.text: Create time-bound promotions with start and end dates and temporary price overrides.
covers.rationale: Seasonal and campaign-driven pricing requires automation to avoid manual errors and ensure consistent application.

covers.text: Enforce discount approval workflows with configurable thresholds by user role.
covers.rationale: Margin protection requires gatekeeping; role-based thresholds balance sales agility with financial control.

covers.text: Display list price, net price, and margin visibility at line item level.
covers.rationale: Real-time margin transparency enables informed pricing decisions and prevents unprofitable deals.

covers.text: Manage coupon and promotional codes with redemption rules, usage limits, and validity periods.
covers.rationale: Controlled coupon campaigns reduce fraud risk and enable accurate revenue recognition and promotion ROI tracking.

covers.text: Define and maintain pricing rules and mark-up calculations applicable across products or segments.
covers.rationale: Reusable pricing rules reduce manual effort and ensure consistent margin targets across the product portfolio.

module_sme_rollup.name: Customer Foundation
module_sme_rollup.description: Unified customer master with contacts, accounts, consent, and interaction history.

statements.text: Create and maintain contact and account records with hierarchical relationships and multiple addresses.
statements.rationale: Single source of truth for customer data

statements.text: Capture GDPR/PDPA consent, privacy preferences, and maintain audit trail of all data access.
statements.rationale: Regulatory compliance and data protection

statements.text: Log all customer interactions—calls, emails, meetings, notes—in unified activity timeline.
statements.rationale: Complete customer context for every engagement

statements.text: Segment customers by tags, attributes, behavior, and profitability for targeted engagement.
statements.rationale: Enable personalized sales and marketing strategies

statements.text: Detect and merge duplicate contacts and accounts with approval workflow.
statements.rationale: Maintain data quality and prevent duplicate effort

module_sme_rollup.name: Sales Pipeline & Execution
module_sme_rollup.description: Lead-to-opportunity management with pipeline visibility, forecasting, and deal tracking.

statements.text: Capture leads from web forms, email, imports, and phone; qualify and assign using configurable rules.
statements.rationale: Systematic lead intake and routing

statements.text: Score leads using rules-based and predictive models; deduplicate and convert to opportunities.
statements.rationale: Prioritize high-quality leads and preserve history

statements.text: Configure flexible sales stages by team or product; assign probability and forecast amount per opportunity.
statements.rationale: Adapt pipeline to business model and forecast accurately

statements.text: Enable multi-user collaboration with owner, team members, and manager visibility on each deal.
statements.rationale: Transparent deal ownership and team alignment

statements.text: Calculate probability-weighted pipeline forecasts; roll up by rep, team, and region with scenario planning.
statements.rationale: Accurate revenue forecasting and quota management

statements.text: Track competitor info and lost-opportunity reasons; identify at-risk deals for early intervention.
statements.rationale: Competitive intelligence and deal recovery

module_sme_rollup.name: Pricing, Quoting & Orders
module_sme_rollup.description: Dynamic pricing, CPQ, order management, and invoice generation with compliance.

statements.text: Maintain multiple price lists by customer type, region, and currency with volume-based discounts.
statements.rationale: Flexible pricing for diverse customer segments

statements.text: Create time-bound promotions and coupon codes with redemption rules and approval workflows.
statements.rationale: Control promotional spend and enforce discount governance

statements.text: Configure products with valid option combinations; apply pricing rules and generate quotes automatically.
statements.rationale: Guided selling and accurate quote generation

statements.text: Create orders with line items, quantities, and pricing; generate and send invoices with PDF.
statements.rationale: End-to-end order fulfillment and customer communication

statements.text: Track order status from creation through delivery; monitor payment status independently per invoice.
statements.rationale: Visibility into fulfillment and cash collection

statements.text: Maintain complete audit trail of all order, invoice, quote, and pricing changes.
statements.rationale: Compliance and dispute resolution

module_sme_rollup.name: Marketing, Engagement & Loyalty
module_sme_rollup.description: Campaign automation, customer journeys, loyalty programs, and multi-channel engagement.

statements.text: Build and send email campaigns with drag-and-drop editor, personalization, and A/B testing.
statements.rationale: Rapid campaign creation and optimization

statements.text: Segment customers dynamically by behavior, demographics, and purchase history for targeted campaigns.
statements.rationale: Relevant messaging to right audience

statements.text: Execute trigger-based workflows for welcome series, abandoned cart, and lifecycle events.
statements.rationale: Automated nurturing and timely engagement

statements.text: Design multi-step customer journeys with conditional logic; measure reach, engagement, and conversion.
statements.rationale: Orchestrated omnichannel customer experience

statements.text: Define loyalty program with tiered membership, points earning, and reward catalog.
statements.rationale: Increase customer retention and lifetime value

statements.text: Measure campaign ROI by linking marketing spend to attributed revenue and conversions.
statements.rationale: Demonstrate marketing effectiveness and optimize spend

module_sme_rollup.name: Customer Service & Support
module_sme_rollup.description: Case management, service delivery, and customer satisfaction across channels.

statements.text: Accept customer inquiries from email, phone, chat, social media, and web into unified inbox.
statements.rationale: Omnichannel support intake and routing

statements.text: Create and track cases with priority, category, SLA target, and automatic escalation on breach.
statements.rationale: Timely resolution and SLA compliance

statements.text: Build customer profiles with transaction history, communication log, and loyalty data within cases.
statements.rationale: Agent context for faster resolution

statements.text: Route cases by round-robin, agent skill, or queue; allow customers to self-serve without agent help.
statements.rationale: Efficient routing and reduced support costs

statements.text: Send customer satisfaction surveys when cases close; track NPS and CSAT by cohort.
statements.rationale: Measure service quality and identify improvement areas

module_sme_rollup.name: Analytics, Reporting & Enablement
module_sme_rollup.description: Dashboards, insights, forecasting, and sales enablement for informed decision-making.

statements.text: Provide role-based dashboards for reps, managers, and executives with sales performance metrics.
statements.rationale: Visibility aligned to role and accountability

statements.text: Analyze pipeline funnel with conversion rates by stage and dimension; drill down to transaction detail.
statements.rationale: Identify bottlenecks and forecast accuracy

statements.text: Calculate customer lifetime value and segment by profitability; analyze lead cohorts by source.
statements.rationale: Identify high-value customers and effective channels

statements.text: Build custom reports with drag-and-drop interface; schedule delivery and export to CSV or PDF.
statements.rationale: Self-service reporting and stakeholder communication

statements.text: Predict lead quality, opportunity closure, and customer churn with AI scoring and alerts.
statements.rationale: Proactive intervention and risk mitigation

statements.text: Maintain centralized sales enablement library with search, recommendations, and usage analytics.
statements.rationale: Equip reps with right content and measure effectiveness

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your customer information is accurate, accessible, and secure—the foundation of everything else in CRM. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA regulations and need staff to access customer data from phones and offices; you also need to pull in existing customer lists and sync with your accounting software. When your sales team is visiting clients and needs instant access to contact history, or when you're auditing who accessed customer data for compliance, this family delivers.

Sales Transactions.narrative: This family handles the core mechanics of selling—creating orders, setting prices, tracking deals, and paying commissions fairly. Every Singapore SME needs to invoice customers and manage discounts; if you sell complex products or have a sales team, you also need to forecast revenue and track commission payouts to keep reps motivated. When you're closing a $50k deal with custom pricing or calculating monthly bonuses for your sales team, this family makes it fast and accurate.

CRM & Relationship.narrative: This family organizes your entire sales process—from first contact through closed deal—so no lead falls through the cracks and every rep knows what to do next. Singapore SMEs with a sales team need to track who is talking to whom, qualify prospects early, and ensure consistent follow-up; you also benefit from a shared library of pitch decks and proposals so every rep looks professional. When your sales manager needs to see the pipeline at a glance or a rep needs to remember what was discussed in last month's meeting, this family keeps the team aligned.

Marketing.narrative: This family automates customer outreach and measures what works—so you spend marketing budget wisely and nurture prospects while you sleep. Singapore SMEs with limited marketing staff can use email campaigns, social media monitoring, and surveys to stay connected to customers without hiring extra headcount; you can also build your own website inside the CRM and see which visitors are most interested. When you want to send a birthday discount to loyal customers or understand why customers are leaving, this family delivers insight and automation.

Commerce.narrative: This family turns your CRM into a sales channel—whether you sell online to consumers, offer a B2B ordering portal, or run a loyalty program. Singapore SMEs selling direct to customers can reduce order-taking overhead and offer 24/7 self-service; if you have repeat customers, loyalty programs and subscriptions lock in recurring revenue and reduce churn. When you want to let customers reorder online without calling, or reward your best customers with points, this family opens new revenue streams.

Customer Service.narrative: This family organizes customer support so every complaint is tracked, routed to the right person, and resolved on time—turning frustrated customers into loyal ones. Singapore SMEs with growing customer bases need a ticketing system to avoid losing complaints in email and to measure response times; a shared knowledge base also lets customers self-serve and reduces support load. When a customer emails a complaint and you need to know if it's been resolved, or when you want to measure how fast your team responds, this family ensures accountability.

Analytics.narrative: This family turns raw CRM data into dashboards and predictions—so you see what's working, forecast revenue accurately, and spot at-risk customers before they leave. Singapore SMEs need visibility into sales pipeline and win rates to manage cash flow; AI-powered scoring also helps reps focus on the most likely deals and highest-value customers. When your bank asks for a revenue forecast or you want to know which customers are most likely to churn, this family gives you the answers.
